/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mesh_chat.dir/example/mesh_chat.cpp.o -o mesh_chat  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/prabhavp/IEEE-ChatterBox/festival-mesh-core/build libfestivalmesh.1.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsodium/1.0.20/lib/libsodium.dylib
